basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT and TGT Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Kalikiri PGT (Computer Science) & TGT (English) Notification 2026 has been released on 18 July 2026 on the official website sskalikiri.kvs.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Sainik School Kalikiri PGT & TGT Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age as on 27 July 2026

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc (Computer Science / IT) / MCA or M.E./M.Tech with B.Ed (50% marks), Four years integrated degree or Bachelors with B.Ed/M.Ed and CTET (Paper-II) (50% marks)
qualification.details: PGT (Computer Science): M.Sc (Computer Science / IT) / MCA or M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science / IT) with B.Ed or equivalent from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks. TGT (English): Four years integrated degree course or Bachelors/Honours Degree with B.Ed/M.Ed from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks and CTET (Paper-II) qualified.

salary_details.details: PGT (Computer Science): Rs. 62,356/- p.m. TGT (English): Rs. 58,819/- p.m.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Classroom Demonstration Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.sainik_school_kalikiri: M.Sc (Computer Science / IT) / MCA or M.E./M.Tech with B.Ed (50% marks), Four years integrated degree or Bachelors with B.Ed/M.Ed and CTET (Paper-II) (50% marks)

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Kalikiri Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Sainik School Kalikiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PGT (Computer Science): M.Sc (Computer Science / IT) / MCA or M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science / IT) with B.Ed or equivalent from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks. TGT (English): Four years integrated degree course or Bachelors/Honours Degree with B.Ed/M.Ed from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks and CTET (Paper-II) qualified.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age as on 27 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: PGT (Computer Science): Rs. 62,356/- p.m. TGT (English): Rs. 58,819/- p.m.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Classroom Demonstration Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026. One vacancy is for PGT (Computer Science) and the other is for TGT (English).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for both PGT (Computer Science) and TGT (English) posts is between 21 years to 40 years as on 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for PGT (Computer Science)?
faq.answer: For the PGT (Computer Science) post, candidates need to have an M.Sc (Computer Science / IT) / MCA or M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science / IT) with B.Ed or equivalent from an NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for TGT (English)?
faq.answer: For the TGT (English) post, candidates require a four years integrated degree course or Bachelors/Honours Degree with B.Ed/M.Ed from an NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks and CTET (Paper-II) qualified.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for PGT (Computer Science) is Rs. 62,356/- per month, and for TGT (English) it is Rs. 58,819/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, Classroom Demonstration, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 27th July 2026.
